summary: I will open the app drawer, search for and open WhatsApp, then search for 'kulsum' within WhatsApp and initiate a call to them.

steps.reason: Open the app drawer to find WhatsApp.
Wait for the app drawer to fully open.
Tap the search bar in the app drawer.
Wait for the keyboard to appear before typing.
Wait for search results to load.
Tap on the WhatsApp app icon from the search results to open it.
Wait for WhatsApp to load completely.
Tap the search icon within WhatsApp to find contacts.
Wait for the search input field and keyboard to appear in WhatsApp.
Type 'kulsum' to search for the contact.
Wait for search results to display the contact.
Tap on the 'kulsum' contact to open their chat.
Wait for the chat screen to load.
Tap the call icon at the top of the chat screen to initiate a voice call.
